command:
import asyncio, json
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def scrape():
    results = {'data': {}, 'errors': []}
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        ctx = await browser.new_context(user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', locale='fr-FR')
        page = await ctx.new_page()
        # Try Bing search with proper JS wait
        try:
            await page.goto('https://www.bing.com/search?q=%22difrence+food%22+oran', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_selector('#b_results', timeout=10000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            items = await page.query_selector_all('#b_results .b_algo')
            bing_results = []
            for item in items[:10]:
                try:
                    title_el = await item.query_selector('h2 a')
                    title = await title_el.inner_text() if title_el else ''
                    href = await title_el.get_attribute('href') if title_el else ''
                    snippet_el = await item.query_selector('.b_caption p')
                    snippet = await snippet_el.inner_text() if snippet_el else ''
                    bing_results.append({'title': title, 'url': href, 'snippet': snippet[:200]})
                except: pass
            results['data']['bing_results'] = bing_results
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'Bing: {str(e)[:200]}')
        # Try Bing with different query
        try:
            await page.goto('https://www.bing.com/search?q=difrence+food+oran+algerie+fast+food+restaurant', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_selector('#b_results', timeout=10000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            items2 = await page.query_selector_all('#b_results .b_algo')
            bing2 = []
            for item in items2[:10]:
                try:
                    t = await item.query_selector('h2 a')
                    title = await t.inner_text() if t else ''
                    href = await t.get_attribute('href') if t else ''
                    s = await item.query_selector('.b_caption p')
                    snip = await s.inner_text() if s else ''
                    bing2.append({'title': title, 'url': href, 'snippet': snip[:200]})
                except: pass
            results['data']['bing_results_2'] = bing2
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'Bing2: {str(e)[:200]}')
        await browser.close()
    print(json.dumps(results, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:5000])

asyncio.run(scrape())
description: بحث Bing عبر Playwright مع انتظار تحميل النتائج - difrence food oran
